programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. programme.title: Sprint Race - Monaco - FIA Formula 3 Championship
programme.desc: With 10 Rounds, plus 10 Teams, the Formula 3 2026 season is more attractive than any any previous season. All F3 is live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Practice 3 - F1 Monaco Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. Practice gives the first real read on long-run pace and tyre wear, qualifying is a flat-out one-lap fight where track evolution matters, and the Grand Prix is 58 laps (306.124km) shaped by strategy, safety cars and pit windows.

programme.title: Sprint Race - Monaco Round - FIA Formula 2 Championship- 2026
programme.desc: Over 14 Rounds, 22 Formula 2 Drivers compete for the Formula 2 Championships and for a seat in Formula 1. All Formula 2 is live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Main Race Qualifying - F1 Monaco Grand Prix - 2026
programme.desc: Albert Park (Melbourne), 6–8 March 2026: the season-opener. programme.title: Match 1 - Roland Garros - 2026 World Feed
programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026 opens the ATP grass-court season in ’s-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands. Played at the Autotron Rosmalen venue, the tournament has been part of the ATP calendar since 1990 and is known for fast grass conditions favouring aggressive players and strong servers as competitors begin preparations for Wimbledon.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: UEFA UCL Magazine 2025/2026 - MD17 Final Review

The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. programme.title: Poland vs Ukraine - Pre-2026 FIFA World Cup Friendly Matches MD1
programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Boss Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Boss Open 2026 takes place in Stuttgart, Germany, at Tennis Club Weissenhof. The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

programme.title: Qatar vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Qatar and Ecuador have met three times previously, all matches taking place in Qatar – their head-to-head record is perfectly balanced with one win each and one draw. Their last encounter saw Qatar win 4-3 in a friendly in October 2018. Qatar are taking part in their first ever FIFA World Cup, whilst also being first nation from the Arab world to h

programme.title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. Argentina have qualified for their 18th FIFA World Cup, with Qatar 2022 being their 13th participation in a row, the third-longest current run after Brazil and Germany. Since 1978, only Germany have

programme.title: Argentina vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina are unbeaten in all four of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, with this the first meeting between the sides at the FIFA World Cup. Argentina have qualified for their 18th FIFA World Cup, with Qatar 2022 being their 13th participation in a row, the third-longest current run after Brazil and Germany. Since 1978, only Germany have

programme.title: England vs Iran - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between England and Iran. The Islamic Republic have never beaten European opposition at the FIFA World Cup. England have qualified for the FIFA World Cup for the 16th time. It’s their seventh appearance in a row, their longest streak in the competition.

programme.title: Belgium vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This is the second meeting between Belgium and Morocco at the FIFA World Cup, with Belgium winning 1-0 in the other in the 1994 edition. Morocco won their last meeting with Belgium in all competitions, winning 4-1 in a friendly back in March 2008. They had lost their two games against the Belgians before this.

programme.title: Spain vs Germany - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the fifth meeting between Spain and Germany at the FIFA World Cup, the joint-most that Spain have faced any side at the competition. They failed to win any of their first three against Germany but won the most recent encounter 1-0 in the 2010 semi-final en route to lifting the trophy. Germany have won just one of their last seven meet

programme.title: Brazil vs Serbia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil have won each of their two previous encounters with Serbia, including their group stage fixture at the last FIFA World Cup. The other was a 1-0 win in a friendly back in June 2014. Brazil are the only team to have taken part in every single FIFA World Cup since its original edition in 1930; this will be their 22nd appearance.

programme.title: Tunisia vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: France have never lost in four previous meetings with Tunisia, with this their first encounter since a 1-1 draw in May 2010. France have alternated between winning and losing in each of their five FIFA World Cup matches against African nations, beating Nigeria 2-0 in their last such match in 2014.

programme.title: Portugal vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Group Stage
programme.desc: Portugal and Ghana’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 2014 FIFA World Cup. Portugal won 2-1, with a Cristiano Ronaldo winning goal. Portugal have won only three of their last 14 World Cup matches, each of them coming in the group stage of the competition – their last victory in the knockout stage came in June 2006, when they p

programme.title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
programme.desc: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

programme.title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
programme.desc: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

programme.title: Argentina vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Final
programme.desc: Argentina are competing in their sixth World Cup final, with only Germany participating in more.
